data.body:
joe-debug: plan-review gate P2 abstains `no_repo_root` (the code-read-root class of bug)

CONTEXT
While starting epic 5ca8 (codebase-health remediation), the first child's plan review
(`rebar review-plan` on dazed-daisy-bur / 0ef9-00e0-6bc1-4d3b) came back with P2
('resolution') abstaining `no_repo_root` and 6 LLM findings parked as
`indeterminate / reason: no-verification`. The verdict still PASSed (0 blocking) and signed,
but the review was running effectively blind to the code. The user paused the epic and asked
to run joe-debug, and to fix the CLASS (not just the symptom): the snapshot resolution should
default to origin/main HEAD cleanly when nothing is specified.

ROOT CAUSE (proven, runtime evidence)
No single authoritative resolver for the gate's CODE read-root; it was threaded ad-hoc across
five hops (review_plan -> produce_plan_review_verdict -> run_workflow -> StepContext ->
workflow op -> assemble_context) and dropped to None at the workflow boundary.
`plan_review_precheck` (src/rebar/llm/plan_review/workflow_ops.py) built its PlanContext via
`assemble_context(tid, repo_root=ctx.repo_root)` with ctx.repo_root=None and NO cfg, so
PlanContext.repo_root resolved to None and det_floor.p2_resolution
(src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_floor.py:227) abstained `no_repo_root`. The degraded /
step-budget-fail path ran the det floor on the ORIGINAL ctx (which had a root) -> P2 passed:
the local-vs-workflow inconsistency was the fingerprint. Runtime evidence:
precheck(repo_root=None) -> abstain no_repo_root; precheck(repo_root=<dir>) -> P2 ran (11
refs, 9 resolved).

FIX (class-level; PR #71, merged as origin/main 8a9e62348)
- New `rebar.llm.config.resolve_code_root(repo_root=None, *, cfg_repo_path=None,
  allow_checkout_fallback=True)`: cascade explicit > cfg.repo_path > active attested snapshot
  (current_code_root, origin/main HEAD by default) > live checkout. Default never None;
  allow_checkout_fallback=False yields snapshot-or-None for lightweight builders that must not
  force a checkout root (which would induce cache writes).
- `orchestrator.assemble_context` resolves the PlanContext.repo_root FIELD via the resolver
  (allow_checkout_fallback=False) — so every det-floor/grounding workflow op picks up the
  active snapshot, defaulting to origin/main HEAD cleanly.

KEY INVARIANT (a regression I introduced and reverted mid-fix)
The workflow's `repo_root` is the TICKET-store read-root (it reaches assemble_context's
rebar.show_ticket(repo_root=...) via StepContext) — NOT the code read-root, which is a
SEPARATE snapshot (cfg.repo_path/current_code_root). My first attempt threaded the CODE
snapshot through produce_plan_review_verdict's run_workflow repo_root; the replication caught
it ("precheck failed: Ticket not found", verdict INDETERMINATE) because the ticket store is
not under the .git-less code snapshot. Reverted that threading; the assemble_context seam fix
alone is correct. gate_dispatch.py now carries a NOTE documenting the distinction.

TESTS (RED -> GREEN, mutation-checked)
- tests/unit/test_config_llm.py::test_resolve_code_root_cascade — all four cascade levels +
  the allow_checkout_fallback=False None branch.
- tests/unit/test_gate_engine_cutover.py::test_precheck_grounds_code_root_without_hijacking_ticket_root
  — P2 grounds against the active snapshot while ticket reads keep the (separate) ticket root.
- tests/unit/test_gate_engine_cutover.py::test_produce_plan_review_does_not_thread_code_snapshot_as_ticket_root
  — produce_ passes the ticket-store root through unchanged; never substitutes cfg.repo_path.
Both behavioral tests confirmed RED for the right reason before the fix; mutating each fix
returned them to RED (teeth); restored -> GREEN. make lint + typecheck clean; 760+ plan_review/
workflow/config unit tests pass with no repo-root leak-guard regressions.

REPLICATION (original report no longer reproduces)
Real `rebar review-plan` in attested mode: verdict PASS, coverage.det.P2 ran=True (11 refs, 9
resolved), llm_ran=True, indeterminate findings 6 -> 1.

TRACKING
Bug undo-tabby-guy (9064-46cf-75dd-4f85), discovered_from dazed-daisy-bur. Shipped via PR #71
(squash-merged to main). Next: resume epic 5ca8 from the de-risking slice dazed-daisy-bur on a
fresh branch off the post-#71 origin/main.
